_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of ML platform components including feature stores, model registries, experiment tracking systems, model serving infrastructure, and pipeline orchestration frameworks.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Knowledge AI-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-007 (DQ, cosine: 0.534), AI-K-010 (AI, cosine: 0.500).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.479). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, systems]. NICE-only terms [architecture] vs WIDAI-only terms [components, experiment, feature, frameworks, infrastructure, ml] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.890 (P=0.928, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.074 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of systems architecture" and "Knowledge of ML platform components including feature stores, model registries," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.538 > STS 0.479 (gap +0.059). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, systems] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, systems]. NICE-only: [architecture]. WIDAI-only: [components, experiment, feature, frameworks, infrastructure, ml].
